full_text:
DAY 0: 14.4.2021

Comments on the tissue: Very fibrotic and solid tumor tissue with adipocytes on top and within the desmoplastic area. The whole excised tissue was one big nodule. LN and FFPE pieces were taken from the center of the nodule, removing the outest part of the tissue. Adjacent left side of the piece went to Färkkilä lab and right side to Kauppi lab.

Sample preparation:

Total yield of cells: 11.05 x 106 cells per ml (total 5 mL).

DAY 1:

Treatment for 48 well plate and Shandon slides.

350 uL medium in 48- well plate. Treatment prepared for 400 uL = 8 x concentration.

6 wells per treatment.

Note! Next time smaller volume is enough per well

Shandon slides: Existing 25 uL of medium was removed and treatment added as full volume.

Calculations can be found in Elina’s physical lab note book

Cultures were imaged using AxioVert (48 well plate) and EVOS (96 well plate)

Shandon slide layout:

DAY 6:

Medium was not changed for 48-well plate cultures of prepared for DNA / RNA isolation

Comments: After initial dissociation, cells remained as small cluster – cell-cell adhesion being strong. During the culture all cell seemed to grow, some organoids became quite packed. Cells seemed not to be too apoptotic with the different treatments, but their growth was slower than on control.

SUMMARY:

Treatment | Working concentration | Stock
Control | 0.1 % DMSO | 100 %
Olaparib | 20 µM | 10 mM
Olaparib | 40 µM | 10 mM
Pembrolizumab | 10 µg / mL | 5 mg / mL
Pembrolizumab | 50 µg / mL | 5 mg / mL
Combination 1 | 20 µM + 10 µg/ mL | 
Combination 2 | 40 µM + 50 µg/ mL |
